meaning: n.Eleanor,Ellen,Helen 的昵称,女人气的男人
examples: Will you do so, my good Nelly?
You shall walk with me, Nelly.
Nelly, come here — is it morning?
Nelly Furtado, The Automatic and Gnarls Barkley also had re-entries with songs first released more than six months ago.
Marc Jacobs, Ashanti, Nelly, and Anthony Mackie are some of her recent guests.
